summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ClickFlow Phase 2 project management tool. Backend APIs (100% success rate) and frontend UI functionality tested. All new Phase 2 features (Gantt, Timeline, Comments, Attachments, Automations) are implemented and working.
passed_tests: All CRUD operations for projects, tasks, goals, time tracking
New Phase 2 endpoints: comments, attachments, automations
Dashboard loads with stats and navigation
5 view tabs present: List, Board, Calendar, Gantt, Timeline
Task creation with title, priority, start_date, due_date
Task detail modal with Comments and Attachments sections
All backend API endpoints working (35/35 tests passed)
